name: Auth.js v5 (Next-Auth)
description: Configure Auth.js v5 with multiple OAuth providers (GitHub, Google, Discord), database sessions via Drizzle adapter, and RBAC. Includes protected API routes, server actions auth, and JWT customization.

steps.description: Install Auth.js v5 beta and Drizzle adapter
Create Auth.js config with providers, Drizzle adapter, callbacks for JWT and session
Create edge-compatible config with authorized() callback for middleware use
Create Auth.js Drizzle schema: users, accounts, sessions, verificationTokens tables
Add AUTH_SECRET, GITHUB_ID, GITHUB_SECRET, GOOGLE_ID, GOOGLE_SECRET
